strategy.name: Turnaround Tuesday
strategy.description: Buy Monday weakness, sell when price recovers. 69% win rate, 7% CAGR historically. Uses IBS filter for quality.

long.description: Monday close < Friday close — weekend gap down
IBS < 0.5 — closed in lower half of range

entry_rules.note: All 3 conditions must pass. Long only — calendar anomaly.

risk_rules.note: Exit after 4 trading days if no exit signal. Larger position since edge is strong.
